title: athlete — helper functions
description: Ergonomic helpers for accessing the active athlete from the request context, resolving age-group snapshots, walking the consent + guardian chain, and rendering medical + emergency contact with permission checks. All helpers are thin wrappers around bound services — never business logic.

helpers.purpose: Returns the resolved Athlete for the current request. Null when no athlete context. Only /me/athletes and per-athlete sub-routes load this.
Returns the resolved Athlete.id without the model load.

Live resolution of the athlete's age group. Bypasses the nightly snapshot for the authoritative computation — use this in enrollment forms where staleness would be bad. Returns null when the DOB falls outside every catalog.
True when age_years < config.athlete.minor_min_age (default 16). Convenience over athlete.is_minor accessor for use in policy classes.

True when the viewer carries `athletes.view.medical` (any athlete) OR `athletes.view.medical.own` AND (viewer.id === target.user_id OR viewer is an active AthleteGuardian for target AND target.consent_medical_disclosure=true) OR `athletes.view.medical.coach` AND (viewer is a Coach on a Team the athlete is enrolled in AND target.consent_medical_disclosure=true). Consumed by the redactor pipeline + by SDUI display logic.
True when the viewer carries `athletes.manage.medical`. Checks include the athlete_medical_tracking entitlement (returns false when off).
True when the viewer carries `athletes.view.emergency_contact` (any) OR `.own` (self OR guardian).
Returns the athlete's next consent expiry (recorded_at + 365 days) when athlete_consent_workflow entitlement is on for the tenant. Null when the entitlement is off (bare-snapshot mode).

True when the athlete's consent flag for the given purpose is true AND (when workflow entitlement on) the recorded_at is < 365 days ago. `purpose` is one of `photo_release` / `medical_disclosure` / `third_party`.

notes: Helpers deliberately delegate — testing swaps the bound service to a stub, and every helper follows.

The medical + emergency-contact gate helpers centralise the permission-checking logic so every caller (observer, controller, SDUI redactor) uses the same source of truth. Divergent checks would create audit gaps.
No helper directly reads the DB — everything routes through repositories + services. Keeps the boundary clean.

Guardian-based checks (athlete_can_view_medical for guardian scope) require the AthleteGuardian sibling module. Wave 3a: the check returns false for guardian scope until the module lands; Wave 3b: hooked.
